changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.createView: SELECT s.tenant_id, date_trunc('day', s.completed_at)::date AS sale_day, date_trunc('month', s.completed_at)::date AS sale_month, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.completed_at)::int AS sale_year, COUNT(*) AS sale_count, SUM(s.total) AS revenue, SUM(s.total - COALESCE(sl_cost.cost_total, 0)) AS gross_profit FROM sales s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sl.sale_id, SUM(sl.quantity * COALESCE(sm.average_cost,0)) AS cost_total FROM sale_lines sl LEFT JOIN stocks sm ON sm.product_id = sl.product_id GROUP BY sl.sale_id ) sl_cost ON sl_cost.sale_id = s.id WHERE s.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY s.tenant_id, date_trunc('day', s.completed_at)::date, date_trunc('month', s.completed_at)::date, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.completed_at)

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.createView: SELECT s.tenant_id, s.cashier_user_id, s.register_id, date_trunc('day', s.completed_at)::date AS sale_day, CASE WHEN s.paid_card > 0 AND s.paid_cash = 0 AND s.paid_mobile = 0 THEN 'CARD' WHEN s.paid_cash > 0 AND s.paid_card = 0 AND s.paid_mobile = 0 THEN 'CASH' WHEN s.paid_mobile > 0 AND s.paid_cash = 0 AND s.paid_card = 0 THEN 'MOBILE' ELSE 'MIXED' END AS payment_method, COUNT(*) AS sale_count, SUM(s.total) AS total_revenue, AVG(s.total) AS avg_ticket FROM sales s WHERE s.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY s.tenant_id, s.cashier_user_id, s.register_id, date_trunc('day', s.completed_at)::date, CASE WHEN s.paid_card > 0 AND s.paid_cash = 0 AND s.paid_mobile = 0 THEN 'CARD' WHEN s.paid_cash > 0 AND s.paid_card = 0 AND s.paid_mobile = 0 THEN 'CASH' WHEN s.paid_mobile > 0 AND s.paid_cash = 0 AND s.paid_card = 0 THEN 'MOBILE' ELSE 'MIXED' END

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.createView: SELECT st.tenant_id, st.warehouse_id, st.product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.sku, st.qty_on_hand, st.qty_reserved, (st.qty_on_hand - st.qty_reserved) AS qty_available, st.average_cost, (st.qty_on_hand * st.average_cost) AS stock_value, CASE WHEN (st.qty_on_hand - st.qty_reserved) <= 0 THEN true ELSE false END AS is_low_stock FROM stocks st JOIN products p ON p.id = st.product_id

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.createView: SELECT pl.tenant_id, pl.id AS lot_id, pl.lot_number, pl.product_id, p.name AS product_name, pl.warehouse_id, pl.expiration_date, (pl.expiration_date - CURRENT_DATE) AS days_remaining, pl.quantity_remaining, pl.status, CASE WHEN (pl.expiration_date - CURRENT_DATE) <= 1 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN (pl.expiration_date - CURRENT_DATE) <= 7 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN (pl.expiration_date - CURRENT_DATE) <= 15 THEN 'MEDIUM' WHEN (pl.expiration_date - CURRENT_DATE) <= 30 THEN 'LOW' ELSE 'OK' END AS risk_level FROM product_lots pl JOIN products p ON p.id = pl.product_id WHERE pl.status = 'ACTIVE'

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.createView: SELECT p.tenant_id, date_trunc('day', p.payment_date::timestamptz)::date AS payment_day, date_trunc('month', p.payment_date::timestamptz)::date AS payment_month, p.type, p.method, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_amount FROM payments p WHERE p.status = 'CONFIRMED' GROUP BY p.tenant_id, date_trunc('day', p.payment_date::timestamptz)::date, date_trunc('month', p.payment_date::timestamptz)::date, p.type, p.method

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.createView: SELECT d.tenant_id, d.status, COUNT(*) AS delivery_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'DELIVERED' AND d.delivered_at::date <= d.scheduled_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status NOT IN ('DELIVERED','CANCELLED') AND d.scheduled_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count FROM deliveries d GROUP BY d.tenant_id, d.status

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.createView: SELECT sl.tenant_id, sl.product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.sku, date_trunc('month', s.completed_at)::date AS sale_month, SUM(sl.quantity) AS qty_sold, SUM(sl.total) AS revenue FROM sale_lines sl JOIN sales s ON s.id = sl.sale_id JOIN products p ON p.id = sl.product_id WHERE s.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY sl.tenant_id, sl.product_id, p.name, p.sku, date_trunc('month', s.completed_at)::date
